originalTitle: Saving for a Switch 2 is easier with Newegg’s gift card deal
summary: If you foresee a bunch of Nintendo purchases in your future, Newegg’s deal on Nintendo gift cards might just help save your wallet. The retailer is offering a deal that lets gamers get $200 worth of credit towards games, consoles, and accessories for just $170. Best of all, the gift cards can stack in your […]
content: If you foresee a bunch of Nintendo purchases in your future, Newegg’s deal on Nintendo gift cards might just help save your wallet. The retailer is offering a deal that lets gamers get $200 worth of credit towards games, consoles, and accessories for just $170. Best of all, the gift cards can stack in your account, letting you accrue enough to buy a Nintendo Switch 2 at a sweet discount. [Product: Nintendo eShop gift cards | https://click.linksynergy.com/deeplink?id=nOD/rLJHOac&mid=44583&murl=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newegg.com%2FProduct%2FComboDealDetails%3Fsdtid%3D19561815%26ItemList%3DCombo.4871073, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.costco.com%2Fp%2F-%2Fnintendo-eshop-four-25-egift-cards%2F4000152900] You don’t have to buy gift cards to reap some savings on a Switch 2, though. Nintendo is currently offering a $499.99 “Choose Your Game” console bundle that includes a discounted game (Donkey Kong Bananza, Pokémon Pokopia, or Mario Kart World). Either way you go, it’s wise to buy a console ahead of the fall because Nintendo is raising the Switch 2’s price by $50 — up to $499.99 — in September. Other deals you might dig * Last week, we highlighted a deal on the Sonos Roam 2, which is down to $134 (usually $179). Sonos improved on its own deal by offering the wireless, water-resistant speaker with Otterbox’s protective carrying case (originally $39.95) included for no extra charge. This case doesn’t take away from the Roam 2’s slick design — it just adds protection for its top and bottom, and throws in a lanyard so you can more easily tote it around. * Here’s a great deal that, thanks to the pre-requisites, some might consider a little too much effort. Apple’s last-gen Studio Display is steeply discounted at Sam’s Club, where a membership is required to make the purchase. The retailer has multiple configurations with matte nanotexture glass selling at good prices — well, good considering how expensive these typically are. For example, the model that has a VESA mount, making it easy to stick onto a monitor arm, is $1,059.91 (originally $1,899), and the one with a tilt- and height-adjustable stand is $1,279.91 (originally $2,299). Read our review of the 2022 model and our recent review of the barely-changed 2026 model. * Sony’s InZone H9 Mk. 2 is an awesome wireless gaming headset that now costs a little less than before. It’s currently $298 (was $349) at Amazon and B&H Photo, or $299.99 at Best Buy. It has sold at this price just a few times since it debuted last summer. The headset shares its drivers in common with Sony’s flagship WH-1000XM6 headphones, which is to say they’re fantastic. It also has effective active noise cancellation, and plenty of comfort thanks to its adjustable headband and plush, breathable ear cushions. The headset supports PC and PS5 via a USB-C 2.4GHz transmitter, as well as Bluetooth for connecting to phones, tablets, and more. Read my impressions.
chineseTitle: Newegg 礼品卡优惠让您更轻松地为 Switch 2 存钱
chineseSummary: 如果您预计将来会购买大量任天堂产品，Newegg 的任天堂礼品卡优惠可能会帮助您节省钱包。该零售商提供一项优惠，让游戏玩家只需 170 美元即可获得价值 200 美元的游戏、游戏机和配件积分。最重要的是，礼品卡可以堆叠在您的[...]
chineseContent: 如果您预计将来会购买大量任天堂产品，Newegg 的任天堂礼品卡优惠可能会帮助您节省钱包。该零售商提供一项优惠，让游戏玩家只需 170 美元即可获得价值 200 美元的游戏、游戏机和配件积分。最重要的是，礼品卡可以累积在您的帐户中，让您累积足够的金额以超值折扣购买 Nintendo Switch 2。 [产品：任天堂 eShop 礼品卡 | https://click.linksynergy.com/deeplink?id=nOD/rLJHOac&mid=44583&murl=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newegg.com%2FProduct%2FComboDealDetails%3Fsdtid%3D19561815%26ItemList%3DCombo.4871073， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.costco.com%2Fp%2F-%2Fnintendo-eshop-four-25-egift-cards%2F4000152900] 不过，您不必购买礼品卡即可在 Switch 2 上节省一些费用。任天堂目前提供价值 499.99 美元的“选择你的游戏”游戏机捆绑包，其中包括一款打折游戏（《大金刚 Bananza》、《神奇宝贝 Pokopia》或《马里奥赛车世界》）。不管怎样，在秋季之前购买游戏机是明智之举，因为任天堂将在 9 月份将 Switch 2 的价格提高 50 美元，最高达到 499.99 美元。您可能会喜欢的其他优惠 * 上周，我们重点介绍了 Sonos Roam 2 的优惠，价格降至 134 美元（通常为 179 美元）。 Sonos 改进了自己的交易，提供无线防水扬声器，并免费提供 Otterbox 保护性手提箱（原价 39.95 美元）。这款保护套并没有影响 Roam 2 的时尚设计，只是为其顶部和底部增加了保护，并配有挂绳，以便您可以更轻松地携带它。 * 由于先决条件的原因，这里有很多内容，有些人可能会认为有点太多的努力。苹果最新一代的 Studio Display 在山姆会员店有大幅折扣，会员可以在山姆会员店享受折扣。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
